data.title: Amazon's Starlink Competitor Will Provide Satellite Internet Services To Delta
data.description: Amazon's stock experienced a boost following the announcement that its satellite internet division secured a partnership with Delta to offer in-flight Wi-Fi services. The collaboration will see Amazon's Starlink competitor providing satellite internet services to the airline. This development signals a promising venture for Amazon as they continue to expand their presence in the satellite internet market.

data.title: AppLovin Stock's 40% Slide Called 'Out Of Step' With Fundamentals
data.description: According to Evercore, AppLovin has experienced a decline of over 40% year-to-date in its stock performance. This significant decrease is not an accurate representation of the adtech company's business strength. Evercore stated that the slide in AppLovin's stock is inconsistent with the fundamentals of the company. The information was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Biogen Lands Two Fast-Growing Drugs In Blockbuster Apellis Deal
data.description: Apellis Pharmaceuticals Inc. (NASDAQ: APLS) is experiencing a rise in shares in premarket trading on Tuesday following the announcement that Biogen Inc. (NASDAQ: BIIB) has agreed to acquire Apellis for $41 per share in cash, totaling approximately $5.6 billion. This acquisition is anticipated to strengthen Biogen's growth portfolio in immunology and rare diseases, providing significant value for both companies amidst the changing healthcare industry landscape. As part of the deal, shareholders will have the opportunity to receive two additional payments of $2 per share through a contingent value right (CVR) tied to specific sales thresholds. Additional details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Bitcoin Whale Is Wall Street's No. 1 Crush And No. 1 Stock Issuer. Coincidence?
data.description: The popular stock on Wall Street remains unchanged since December, with significant attention being given to a Bitcoin Whale being both Wall Street's top favorite and primary stock issuer. This coincidence has sparked discussions and intrigue among investors and analysts, indicating a potential correlation between the two factors.

data.title: Schools Turn to Human + AI for Personalized College Guidance — DreamCollege.ai Expands School Edition
data.description: DreamCollege.ai has introduced its School Edition in Dallas, a platform combining human expertise with AI technology to enhance personalized college guidance for students. This innovative tool aims to assist schools in improving counselor efficiency and expanding their college counseling services.

data.title: Innocan Pharma Announces Offering of an Additional Debenture to Tamar Innovest
data.description: Innocan Pharma Corporation, with stock symbols CSE: INNO, FSE: IP4, and OTC: INNPF, has disclosed plans to carry out an offering of a debenture. The company, based in Herzliya, Israel and Calgary, AB, aims to issue the debenture to its main stakeholder. The announcement was made on March 31, 2026.

data.title: STARTRADER Completes Youth Sports Initiative in Thailand, Delivering Community Impact
data.description: A new basketball court has been built in SUKHOTHAI, Thailand, highlighting increased access to organized sports for local youth and communities. Completed by STARTRADER, an NBA partner, the redevelopment project has transformed a multi-purpose court at Ban Nam Lat. This initiative is expected to provide a safe and structured environment for sports enthusiasts, with the court serving as a hub for basketball activities. The development is part of efforts to promote physical fitness and community engagement, reflecting a commitment to supporting grassroots sports.

data.title: CPSC Warns Consumers to Stop Using Male-to-Male Extension Cords, Secures Delisting Commitments from e-Commerce Platforms
data.description: On March 31, 2026, the US Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) announced that it successfully had male-to-male extension cord listings removed from leading e-commerce sites. This includes Walmart, eBay, and AliExpress. Consumers are being cautioned to discontinue using these hazardous products to prevent potential dangers.

data.title: FDA likely to lift restrictions on peptides, responding to RFK Jr.'s request. Peptides were removed from compounding pharmacies list in 2023.
data.description: In 2023, compounding pharmacies were no longer permitted to sell peptides, which are often promoted for their abilities to enhance longevity and improve health. This came after these products were taken off the agency's list of authorized items.

data.title: Brother International Corporation Announces Top Management Changes
data.description: Bridgewater, New Jersey - On March 31, 2026, Brother International Corp. (BIC-USA) disclosed the selection of Kenji Kamei as the new president, starting on April 1, 2026. This move aims to drive the company's expansion in the Americas region. Kamei, previously the vice president, will now lead the company towards its next growth stage.

data.title: DoControl Sets the Bar for AI Security with Industry-First Control of Google Gemini Gems
data.description: On March 31, 2026, DoControl, a prominent player in SaaS data security, unveiled enhanced features offering visibility, monitoring, and automated control for Google Gemini Gems. This new addition in Google Gemini empowers teams to efficiently generate ...

data.title: STAYPINEAPPLE LAUNCHES BRAND NEW TAGLINE "WHERE STAYS BECOME STORIES"
data.description: In conjunction with a guest spotlight initiative, the boutique hotel brand Staypineapple, based in KIRKLAND, Wash., has introduced its new tagline, "Where Stays Become Stories." The tagline showcases the brand's dedication to transforming stays into memorable experiences. This announcement was made on March 31, 2026. Staypineapple is widely recognized for its unique approach to hospitality and has properties across the nation.

data.title: EMU's "Factory of the Future" Program Scores Top Marks from Students
data.description: A pioneering educational initiative supported by Coherix in the United States has been established to specialize in adhesive-dispensing technology. An impressive statistic reveals that over 20% of students enrolled in the program have secured employment opportunities even before their graduation. This groundbreaking program, situated in Ypsilanti, Michigan, sets the stage for the future workforce in advanced manufacturing. The program's primary focus on cutting-edge adhesive-dispensing technology highlights its commitment to equipping students with essential skills for the industry.

data.title: DaySmart Acquires UK Salon Platform Slick, Extending its Global Reach in Beauty and Wellness
data.description: DaySmart Software, a prominent provider of business management solutions for entrepreneurs and small businesses, has revealed the acquisition of Slick Software, a rapidly growing salon technology platform in the UK. The acquisition signifies a significant step in DaySmart’s worldwide growth strategy and further solidifies its presence in the beauty and wellness industry. Established in 2017, Slick has emerged as a key player in the UK as an autonomous salon platform outside of marketplaces. This move underscores DaySmart’s commitment to expanding its reach and strengthening its foothold in the sector.

data.title: i-Lumen Scientific Receives FDA Approval of IDE to Initiate U.S. Enrollment in i-SIGHT2 Clinical Study for dry AMD
data.description: FDA approval of the IDE has allowed for the expansion of a global trial to the United States alongside the initiation of treatment for the first participant in the United Kingdom. This development was announced by i-Lumen Scientific, Inc., a prominent player in energy-based advancements for ophthalmology. The significant milestone was disclosed in BLOOMINGTON, Minn., on March 31, 2026.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Boyd Street Ventures/
data.description: Boyd Street Ventures has announced the launch of Boyd Street Capital and the appointment of a board to support its $500 million platform strategy. The news was released on March 31, 2026. The company has disclosed the media contact information for public access.

data.title: SWAN PLUMBING, HEATING & AIR ENCOURAGES COLORADO HOMEOWNERS TO PLAN AHEAD AS LOW NOx REGULATION CHANGE AND SUMMER HEAT APPROACHES
data.description: On March 31, 2026, in Denver, new low-NOx regulations in Colorado are altering the HVAC systems technicians can install. Due to these changes, prices are predicted to increase. Swan Plumbing, Heating & Air, in response, is advising homeowners in Denver and Northern Colorado to prepare for potential cost hikes.

data.title: My Pediatric Doctor Launches National 24/7 Urgent Pediatric Care Telehealth Platform and Sets A Strategic Vision for Health System and Payer Integration
data.description: Pediatric telehealth care services are now accessible 24/7 across all 50 states, Guam, and Puerto Rico. My Pediatric Doctor, a crucial digital healthcare platform, is leading this initiative. This service caters to a wide array of healthcare innovation consortia, hospital systems, and insurance providers. The development was announced on March 31, 2026, demonstrating a significant advancement in pediatric care accessibility.
